ddls:
CREATE TABLE "battery_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the battery unit */,
  "voltages" REAL /* Voltage reading of the battery unit */,
  "currents" REAL /* Current reading of the battery unit */,
  "temperatures" REAL /* Temperature reading of the battery unit */,
  "charge_currents" REAL /* Charge current reading of the battery unit */,
  "charge_voltages" REAL /* Charge voltage reading of the battery unit */,
  "time_step" REAL /* Time step at which the data was recorded */,
  "battery_cycle" INTEGER /* Number of charge-discharge cycles */,
  "internal_resistance" REAL /* Internal resistance of the battery */,
  "soh_percentage" REAL /* State of health percentage at the data point */,
  "environmental_conditions" TEXT /* Environmental conditions affecting battery performance */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the physical location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_battery_data_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("unit_id") REFERENCES battery_units ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "battery_units" (
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each battery unit */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the battery unit */,
  "capacity" REAL /* Capacity of the battery unit in kWh */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the battery unit was installed */,
  "state_of_health" REAL /* State of health of the battery unit, indicating performance degradation */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the battery unit */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Unique serial number of the battery unit */,
  "warranty_expiration_date" TEXT /* Warranty expiration date for the battery unit */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance performed */,
  "maintenance_cycle" TEXT /* Maintenance cycle (e.g., every 6 months) */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the physical location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login time of the user */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user's account (e.g., active, suspended, locked) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the battery unit triggering the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., Voltage Drop, High Temperature) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was generated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the alert */,
  "severity_level" TEXT /* Severity level of the alert (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "resolved_by" TEXT /* User who resolved the alert */,
  "resolution_time" TEXT /* Time when the alert was resolved */,
  "resolution_notes" TEXT /* Notes or actions taken to resolve the alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_resolved_by FOREIGN KEY ("resolved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("unit_id") REFERENCES battery_units ("unit_id")
)
